ai.title: QCI Launches QCI RV, Turning Casino RV Parks into High-Value Revenue Engines
ai.description: SAN DIEGO, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Quick Custom Intelligence (QCI), a leading provider of AI-driven operations software for tribal gaming resorts, today announced the launch of QCI RV, a new solution designed to help casino properties better manage and monetize their on-site RV parks. Debuting at the Indian Gaming Association (IGA) Tradeshow & Convention 2026, QCI RV enables operators to treat RV stays not as simple parking, but as integrated, high-value guest experiences.
